# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for container security and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    postgresql-14 \
    redis-server \
    python3 \
    python3-pip \
    supervisor \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN useradd -r -u 1001 -g daemon webuser && \
    useradd -r -u 1002 -g daemon apiuser && \
    mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /var/run/postgresql /var/run/redis && \
    chown postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql && \
    chown redis:redis /var/run/redis

RUN mkdir -p /app/web /app/api && \
    chown webuser:daemon /app/web && \
    chown apiuser:daemon /app/api

COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

RUN sed -i "s/^#listen_addresses = 'localhost'/listen_addresses = '127.0.0.1'/" /etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf && \
    sed -i "s/^port = 5432/port = 5432/" /etc/postgresql/14/main/postgresql.conf && \
    echo "host all all 127.0.0.1/32 scram-sha-256" >> /etc/postgresql/14/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    echo "local all all scram-sha-256" >> /etc/postgresql/14/main/pg_hba.conf

RUN sed -i "s/^bind 127.0.0.1/bind 127.0.0.1/" /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i "s/^# requirepass foobared/requirepass $(openssl rand -base64 32)/" /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i "s/^protected-mode yes/protected-mode yes/" /etc/redis/redis.conf

RUN echo "daemon off;" >> /etc/nginx/nginx.conf && \
    chown -R www-data:www-data /var/lib/nginx /var/log/nginx

RUN mkdir -p /run/postgresql && chown postgres:postgres /run/postgresql

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=40s --retries=3 \
    CMD pgrep nginx && pgrep redis-server && pgrep postgres && pgrep python3 || exit 1

VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql", "/var/lib/redis", "/app"]

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
